description: Out-of-scope (psychotic-spectrum, edge-with-grief): description points clearly to psychotic-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'psychotic-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: My mother died three years ago. Since then I've been hearing voices that are not connected to her at all — strangers' voices, sometimes saying terrible things about me. I see flickers of shadows at the edges of my vision when nothing is there. I have this growing sense that I am being watched and I do not know by whom. It has been getting worse.
